basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Manager-Industry Connect Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of TISS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Manager-Industry Connect Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Marketing or relevant field
qualification.details: Manager-Industry Connect: Minimum Postgraduate in Marketing or in the relevant field. 06 to 08 years' business development out of which minimum three years in the Education field. Requisite skills including proficiency in MS Office, excellent communication, multitasking, CSR connect.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Manager-Industry Connect Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Manager-Industry Connect recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Manager-Industry Connect position is 10 May 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager-Industry Connect post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Marketing or a relevant field. Additionally, 06 to 08 years of business development experience is required, with at least three years in the education sector.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Manager-Industry Connect position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Manager-Industry Connect role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Manager-Industry Connect post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Manager-Industry Connect in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the TISS Manager-Industry Connect recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs 500/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs 125/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Manager-Industry Connect post involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article for your convenience.

faq.question: Q9. What are the required skills for the Manager-Industry Connect role?
faq.answer: Key skills include proficiency in MS Office, excellent communication abilities, multitasking capabilities, and CSR connect.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of TISS?
faq.answer: The official website of the Tata Institute of Social Sciences is www.tiss.edu. You can visit it for more information.
